full_text:
Zhang Miao (Mengzhuo) 張邈 (孟卓)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Miao (張邈), styledMengzhuo (孟卓), was born in Donggping. Friend of Yuan Shao and Cao Cao, rebelled against Cao Cao. Killed by his own men later on. Zhang Miao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, the Wei Kingdom, and Lu Bu. Zhang Miao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
